form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 53 days. Last outing made ground from midfield; finished ninth of 12 starters at Market Rasen on February 17 over 4100m, slow track; 10 len behind Pretending with 73.5kg at $13. At only start last preparation pulled up at Ascot on November 22 over 4700m. Fitter for run. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second-up today. Not raced for 53 days. Last outing made ground from midfield; finished ninth of 12 starters at Market Rasen on February 17 over 4100m, slow track; 10 len behind Pretending with 73.5kg at $13. At only start last preparation pulled up at Ascot on November 22 over 4700m. Fitter for run. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Useful mare. Freshened for 44 days. Last outing pulled up at Ludlow on February 26 over 4800m. The start before to post a big 4 len win. Doncaster on February 5 over 3900m on rain affected going defeating Lets Go To Vegas with 69kg at $6 in a hurdle. No surprise to see her back in form today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Useful mare. Freshened for 44 days. Last outing pulled up at Ludlow on February 26 over 4800m. The start before to post a big 4 len win. Doncaster on February 5 over 3900m on rain affected going defeating Lets Go To Vegas with 69kg at $6 in a hurdle. No surprise to see her back in form today.

form.formComment: Freshened for 53 days. Last outing made some head-way from midfield; ran last in a small field at Newbury on February 17 over 4900m, slow track; 16 len behind Star Of Honour with 71kg at $3.80. The run before finished second of 9 starters at Lingfield on December 21 over 4600m, on slow going 2.25 len behind Block Rockin Beats with 72kg at $21. Ideally placed to return to form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Freshened for 53 days. Last outing made some head-way from midfield; ran last in a small field at Newbury on February 17 over 4900m, slow track; 16 len behind Star Of Honour with 71kg at $3.80. The run before finished second of 9 starters at Lingfield on December 21 over 4600m, on slow going 2.25 len behind Block Rockin Beats with 72kg at $21. Ideally placed to return to form.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Comes off a 53 day let-up. Last outing made ground from midfield; finished fourth in a small field at Newbury on February 17 over 4900m, slow track; 15 len behind Star Of Honour carrying 68.5kg at $3.50. The run before sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished third of 11 starters at Wincanton on January 29 over 4300m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Coolanna carrying 71kg at $8. Strong run latest and can measure up this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Impressive in recent runs. Comes off a 53 day let-up. Last outing made ground from midfield; finished fourth in a small field at Newbury on February 17 over 4900m, slow track; 15 len behind Star Of Honour carrying 68.5kg at $3.50. The run before sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished third of 11 starters at Wincanton on January 29 over 4300m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Coolanna carrying 71kg at $8. Strong run latest and can measure up this time.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fifth of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 3900m, 23 len behind Joeybottles carrying 75kg at $29. Previously second-up finished third of 8 runners at Uttoxeter on December 9 over 3200m, on slow going 16 len behind Authodidacte carrying 72kg at $11. Will need plenty of improvement to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fifth of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 3900m, 23 len behind Joeybottles carrying 75kg at $29. Previously second-up finished third of 8 runners at Uttoxeter on December 9 over 3200m, on slow going 16 len behind Authodidacte carrying 72kg at $11. Will need plenty of improvement to break through.

form.formComment: Last outing finished seventh of 10 starters at this track on March 26 over 4700m, 20 len behind Moor End with 71.5kg at $11. Start before finished third in a small field at Ffos Las on March 16 over 3900m, on slow going 3.5 len behind Boston Joe carrying 72kg at $9.50. Has ability but needs to do more.
